title: Scope
doc_html:
§418. Scope

            No provision within this Chapter shall supersede any other provisions of this Title to the contrary.

            Acts 2016, No. 413, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2017.
doc_text:
§418.  Scope
No provision within this Chapter shall supersede any other provisions of this Title
to the contrary.
Acts 2016, No. 413, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2017.
